ogTitle: Machans Beach vs Mackay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Machans Beach and Mackay.
heading: Machans Beach vs Mackay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Machans Beach, Queensland and Mackay, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Machans Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Mackay (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Machans Beach or Mackay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Machans Beach has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Mackay scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Machans Beach scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Mackay scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Machans Beach or Mackay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Machans Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
